title: Woman (20) fatally stabbed
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 20-year-old woman was...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 20-year-old woman was fatally stabbed in the neck in Dyabaza Street, KwaNonqaba, on Wednesday, 4 December.


> Police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said the murder took place just before 23:00.


The woman was found by the police with a stab wound to her neck and she was declared dead at the scene by emergency medical services.

Spies said a case of murder was opened and a 19-year-old man was arrested in connection with the murder.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
